headlines.headline: Orevov Solutions confirms participation in Capital Markets Day

sentiment.reasoning: Rising costs directly pressuring margins indicate a negative financial impact on profitability for the company.

headlines.headline: Zelval Energy names new head of supply chain optimization division

sentiment.reasoning: Warnings of supply chain disruptions directly affecting operations indicate potential negative impacts on production, delivery, and profitability.

scoring.methodology: Gemini scores only the effect implied by the headline text itself, then separates immediate reaction versus later carry-through within the same 100-day session.
